full_text:
Liu Bin
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Bin. Governor who tested out Guan Lu’s ability, asking him what was in the box. Liu Bin may not have existed in history. Liu Bin was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
